title: verbascum auriculatum
intro: Verbascum auriculatum, also known as the auriculated mullein, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Verbascum auriculatum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and aiding in the healing of wounds, as well as supporting respiratory health and immune function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal infusion or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
